   Portfolio problem

Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: portfolioModel(num_assets: int, covariance: numpy.ndarray, gamma: float = 2.25)

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.copt.coptmodel.optCoptModel`


   This class is an optimization model for the portfolio problem

   :ivar _model: COPT model
   :vartype _model: COPT model
   :ivar num_assets: number of assets
   :vartype num_assets: int
   :ivar covariance: covariance matrix of the returns
   :vartype covariance: numpy.ndarray
   :ivar risk_level: risk level

   :vartype risk_level: float


   .. py:attribute:: num_assets


   .. py:attribute:: covariance


   .. py:attribute:: risk_level


.. py:data:: optmodel
